relationships.weight: Pigeonpea spread from India to East Africa.
Pigeonpea spread from East Africa to the American continent.
Pigeonpea is mentioned in Sanskrit literature.
Pigeonpea is mentioned in Buddhist literature.
Pigeonpea is cultivated in tropical regions.
Pigeonpea is cultivated in semi-tropical regions.
